title: Rich Roasted Italian Garlic Stir-fry
description: A rich and crispy Tuscan dish featuring roasted garlic combined with curry powder for a dash-friendly twist in one pot.
instructions: Mince garlic cloves, chop herbs finely, and mix curry powder with olive oil in a large bowl.
Season chicken pieces on both sides with salt and pepper. Place them in an oven-proof dish and pour the spice mixture over evenly.
Roast chicken for about 20 minutes or until cooked through (internal temperature reaches at least 165°F). Remove from oven, let it rest for a few minutes.
While chicken is roasting, cook rice noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In the same dish with residual hot oil, sauté chopped garlic and remaining herbs until fragrant but not browned.
Mix cooked rice noodles into the garlic-herb mixture along with sour cream if using.
Slice rested chicken breasts into thin strips and add them to the noodle-garlic mixture. Toss everything together gently.
Serve hot as a main course or side dish.
